spdx:CERN Open Hardware Licence Version 2 - Strongly Reciprocal
Create a text file (typically named LICENSE or LICENSE.txt) in the root of your
source code and copy the text of the license into the file.
Permissions of this strongly reciprocal license for hardware designs are
conditioned on making available complete sources of licensed works and
modifications, which include larger works using a licensed work, under the same
license. Notices must be preserved. Contributors provide an express grant of
